## Tags
firewall, security, bricks, mortar, cement, materials, construction, builder, labourer, quantity surveyor, blocks, stone, campfire, camping, wilderness, outdoors, lit, warmth, wood, twigs, sticks

## Categories
security, home, connectivity

## Source
[Lucide v1.14.0](https://lucide.dev/icons/brick-wall-fire)

## Example
```rust
use dioxus::prelude::*;
use dioxus_icons::lucide::BrickWallFire;

fn app() -> Element {
    rsx! {
        BrickWallFire { size: 20, color: "red" }
    }
}
```
